channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE — 26 replies — 75.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-04-30 23:11 UTC

OP

I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER
REEEEEEEEEE

Early replies (first 3)

62173936
>>62173926
Trust the plan goy

62173941
>>62173926
gas in california is over $6 right now, you have it easy all things considered

62174058
>>62173926
Its 9.35 in Germany if you calculate it in your weird metric. But the median net salary is only 40k dollar for ful time work.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174083
>>62174058
>in germany

62174105
>>62173926
>>62173941
>>62174058
You deserve it

62174118
>>62174058
Don't you guys get to ride trains everywhere and get your daily dose of diversity?

62174126
>>62174058
You voted for parties that dismantled your nuclear energy infrastructure, so you dont get to complain about energy costs, lmao

62174252
>>62173926
>Downing Street
>driving while texting
>saying a stinker gas station in the middle of Denver is expensive

Nigga are you retarded?

62174259
>>62173926
try Indiana lmao

62174382
>>62174259
Why would they name a whole state after India?

62174390
>>62174382
Because we are the true arians saaaaaaaaar

62174505
>>62173926
yeah well, it the los angeles area its over $6.00 a gallon now.

62174544
>>62174259
Really sad I passed up the 4.17 I saw yesterday
Where's that jackass who said it was only $4 and that wasn't even that bad?

62174560
>>62174252
I’m not driving all the way to Arvada for gas faggot

62174600
>>62173926
That's half what we pay in Europe normally.

62174944
>>62174544
>only $4
It's only $3.39 though. Not sure what you're griping about, this is a literal nothingburger.
>passed up 4.17 yesterday
Lol. You voted for those gasoline taxes. You voted for those environmental regulations. You voted to shut down those fracking rigs. You voted against those pipelines. You voted to close those refineries. You did this to yourself. Now you get to lay back and enjoy the fruits of your labors. So quit your bitching, you little faggot.

62174951
>>62174944
What part of Texas is in Indiana, buddy?

62174963
You guys are almost paying California prices. It's 5.09 here right now.

62174977
>>62174944
>texas
creo tu eres un joto.

62174998
>>62173926
I voted for this

62175538
>>62174118
Yes it's very vibrant and uhm dark
>>62174126
Well not me

62175544
this is just the beginning, and this is why the current stock valuation is tarded. just wait

62175608
>>62173926
>Dinosaur in logo
"Fossil fuels"(LOL) Yes, goy, thissss oil is preciousssss

62175657
>>62174058
It's 10.33 in Israel.

62175885
>>62174944
All this effort for the most retarded post I’ve seen this week. Bravo

62175898
Good.
Let the wealth gap grow.

item.title: Is USA planned economy? — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is USA planned economy?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-30 23:28 UTC

OP

Is USA planned economy?

Early replies (first 3)

62175018
Kinda. The goycattle are herded into very particular tasks.

62175039
All of us in the west are socialist. "Semi planned", "planned with extra steps." They don't necessarily nationalize the economy entirely, instead they just turbo regulate it, redistribute the resources aggressively towards their own ends, direct the headwinds with the central banks. Anyone who pretends like these are free markets is an absolute moron.

62175062
>>62175013
Mixed.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62175105
>>62175039
Silicon valley is a good example I think. It's just all offices where majority of people don't really produce anything of value. But they're trillions of dollars flowing through that system.

62175127
>>62175013
ORANGED ECONOMY

62175133
>>62175013
It's planned in a way for Jews to siphon off wealth produced by the goyim in as efficient a manner as possible.

62175229
Its a managed economy.

62175252
>>62175229
They manage it by emitting money and redistributing it through certain corporations?

62175262
>>62175013
Good morning sir

62175302
>>62175252
Yeah basically. When there's no corporation to inject money into they just hire people to do government work. The military was used for that for ages and ages. When recruitment dropped they implemented DEI policies. Those people then use their paychecks to buy houses, clothes, groceries, etc. which moves the money around in the economy. The difference between this system and a planned one is that nobody is sitting in DC figuring out how many pairs of boots or jars of pickles need to be made, they just look at how much money needs to be injected into the system to make the GDP, asset prices, inflation, etc. do what they want.

62175328
>>62175302
A good example is the government investments into AI. There wasn't much else going on with the US economy so they dumped assloads of money into AI. Result is GDP going up. If that turns out to be a bubble they'll just find something else to shoot money into.

62175338
>>62175018
Yes
Thanks to 1890s and 1900s extremely lax laws on everything resulting in the public eating arsenic, sawdust, cocaine in medicine, now everything is so heavily regulated and requires goycattle upon goycattle to arrange what could be done with 1/20th of the current labor pool

62175906
>>62175013
yea, a Planned obsolescence economy

62175944
>>62175328
a war in Iran perhaps
also this
also fuck Europe
fuck Ukraine
also fuck you guys, fix the economy right now

item.title: Where do you guys get your financial news? — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Where do you guys get your financial news?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-30 23:24 UTC

OP

Where do you guys get your financial news? I want something non kiked. On /pol/ they have PNN which is primarily on Bitchute. I checked Bitchute and Rumble but it doesn't seem like their are any based independent journalists that report on the finance industry and especially the crypto/block chain side of things. Any suggestions?

Early replies (first 3)

62175598
>>62175574
/biz/

62175652
>>62175574
This shit actually makes me sick with grief

62175756
>financial news
LMAO! oh anon, you make me laugh. Don't listen to that shit, it's designed to make you act a certain way to liquidate you

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62175761
kek why the fuck is it every time I think about killing myself I see this stupid image and this stupid ass thread reposted.

62175792
>>62175761
It's a webm and that's divine intervention telling you to reconsider and remember a better time

62175808
>>62175574
/biz/ used to be good enough for crypto

62175845
>>62175761
This is the FIRST time I have ever posted this thread
>>62175598
Not good enough. 2017-2019 /biz/ was the peak. Very few other outlets not only offered insights into where the new money making opportunities were that also allowed you to have completely unfiltered opinions (i.e being able to say nigger)

This was the place where Banks and Assblaster leaked inside info. Or where some of the most infamous eth memecoins got their run. It has now fallen and likely will never be kino again. Just how it is. Like how /pol/ will never go back to the pre 2016 days.

What I want to know is what are some other outlets that have an intelligent and non pozzed user base and a good amount of users. While also being a bit discreet in their activities.

62175854
>>62175652
This must have been how our grandparents felt watching their kids go through the 70s
I barely remember times like these, and it all feels so unimaginable these days
Its too bad we won't live to see civilization return

62175855
>>62175761
Dont do it anon

62175926
>>62175761
You will never know teen love

item.title: What plan is best assuming you have $50k cash? — 12 replies — 26.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
What plan is best assuming you have $50k cash?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-04-30 23:04 UTC

OP

What plan is best assuming you have $50k cash?

A) Wait until there's a major correction and go all in SOXL. Dca out at ATHs.

B) Buy MSTR in June to Dec 2026 (whenever BTC hits 50k). Sell at a 5x-10x.

C) All in BTC in Oct. Then 25% alts. 5% new memes. Sell all in 2-3 years.

D) 30% EMXC, 20% QLD, then later this year 20% OpenAI, 20% Anthropic, 10% SpaceX. Wait 10 years.

Early replies (first 3)

62170608
>>62170600
buy CF and UUUU

62170742
>>62170608
Hmm looks like it would be the safest but lowest returns. For everything else I'd only buy near the max drawdown area for the highest upside and lowest theoretical risk (just requires the most patience)

62170747
>>62170600
E. All in on Bitcoin right now

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62170770
F. DCA BTC and ETH

62171577
>>62170600
So many people are expecting an october low for BTC that I wonder if it's going to happen earlier.

62171646
>>62171577
If it happens earlier then I'll buy then. Anything under 50k seems good to me
>>62170747
>>62170770
No MSTR?

62171893
>>62171646
All in on BTC, get a BTC loan from Coinbase, then all in on MSTR, then sell MSTR to pay back the Coinbase loan, then sell BTC.

62171899
>>62171893
how does the loan work on Coinbase? Say you buy $50k of BTC, how much can you get a loan for? what's the catch?

62171914
what's funny is that I know you're the same guy who keeps posting this thread, but since you always say 50k I'm guessing you actually have 50k

But you've been posted this for a month. Soxl was only 60 bucks a month ago. Nigga. You missed your buy in. Lol.

62171921
>>62171899
You get like 75% or something. The catch is if it goes down too far it will liquidate you.

62171930
>>62171914
It was $80 the first time I asked. I wasn't going to fomo in though

62175878
>>62171893
Anon just stake BTC and add to your position, no one gives a fuck.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 111 replies — 161.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 111 • Updated: 2026-04-30 22:50 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174921
>>62172412
If you are over the age of 18 and let a woman do this to you you deserve it. Only weak men get “raped” by women, no woman should be able to physically or mentally overpower you.

62175029
>>62172902
She literally inserted a dildo in his ass. Femdom stops being hot when it becomes gay

62175043
>>62172413
Doesn't read like something a woman would say, fish-head is also a weird racist insult for a white person to use.

62175073
>>62172412
Big ass forehead, wouldn't bang.

62175076
>>62175029
>she pegged him
Yeah?

62175120
>>62173174
I would be proud to have a femdom rapist daughter.
>>62175073
She'd bang you though.

62175122
Why didn't the guy just say no or report her to her boss? What a crock of shit. What really happened is he got caught cheating and told his idiot wife he was raped and she probably said something like "Oh yeah? Rape huh? Then report it to the police." And now he's going through a public humiliation ritual instead of the consenual one he went through in private.

Cashgrab bullshit. Keep in mind he could have just stood up and said "No, do not rape me in the butt" and physically she would not be able to do anything to him.

62175125
>>62172413
Unfathomably BASED.
10/10 would become her sex slave.

62175297
She is Martin Shkreli's cousin!

62175330
>>62172413
Holy shit I didn’t know women could be like this

62175333
>>62175076
Are you gay?

62175371
>>62175333
Getting pegged by a hot woman who you can also fuck is not gay, it’s just a bit shitty

62175381
>>62172540
if its even real lol

62175384
>>62174807
can't believe I read all that. There's no specific incidents or evidence or nothing, literally just vague blogposting. These women really think they are the gods of the universe, how dare a man that they don't approve of get a girlfriend, insane.

62175387
>>62172413
She's Albanian???
What the fuck
If this is real her father may honor kill both her and the jeet

62175398
>>62173376
Who knows if this is even real
Maybe some jew wanted to fuck her and she refused and now she's getting framed as revenge

62175411
>>62174188
Yeah this is sounding more and more like some kike framing her for refusing his advances

It's just unbelievable any woman would want a jeet to fuck them
Not even pajeetas want to fuck jeets

62175580
>>62175371
Getting a dick in your ass is gay under all circumstances

62175583
>>62172413
Fake.

62175614
>>62172413
Albanian women are basically sex fiends stuck in the 1950s because their parents raised them properly with beatings and intimidation

62175635
>>62172413
please please please God let this be real it’d be so fucking funny

62175638
>>62172425
wondering the same thing
closest i ever got was not worth writing home about

62175644
>>62173189
guess what bro, u way too old

women like 'em young, easier to control

62175666
>>62174921
happened to me in accounting, it's a woman's field, i was a loser for being there, ruined my 20s and my 30s, the women just got fatter & uglier

62175673
>>62175029
Moments later, Doe accuses his superior of forcibly removing his pants and performing oral sex on him against his will.

62175811
https://nypost.com/2026/04/30/business/bombshell-jpmorgan-sex-harassment-suit-that-went-viral-branded-complete-fabrication-as-john-doe-accuser-unmasked/
BREAKING NEWS
IT WAS JEET FANFICTION
His izzat is going to be destroyed.

62175813
>>62172412
the story is fake, the guy is indian

62175827
>>62175811
>>62175813
Erhm says who? The accused's lawyer? What did you expect him to say?

62175832
>>62175827
it's heuristically obvious the story is fake because the guy is indian. you are indian

62175844
>>62175813
This.

Anyone who has ever dealt with Jeets knows they lie and scam like this.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 165 replies — 75.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 165 • Updated: 2026-04-30 21:21 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167147
If you can make it to 40-50 as a NEET you have already won the lottery of life. But if you really want to live to be 75+ and retire into a nursing home then you have to work.

62167346
>>62167147
Retire in to a nursing home? What? lol

62167389
>>62167147
https://reddit.com/r/NEET/comments/ifcblr/today_i_became_a_40_year_old_virgin_neet_some/

62167410
>>62158557

62167440
>>62158601
>Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.


You're a robot born to entertain themselves to death while feeding the capitalist system. You're less than human

62167526
>>62167025
read my first post itt, i was a neet for 3 years

62167534
>>62167526
I have been neet my whole life. How about you?

62167920
>>62167534
>I have been neet my whole life.
That's just called being a woman.

62168012
>>62166519
No

62168184
really both suck. having something to do that you truly love its all that matter.

62168378
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago
Same woman has sucked a stranger's dick 10 minutes before she met you.

62168687
>>62158601
Lamo I had no idea I can cause this much seethe looooool
>>62168378
Nah, you say that cause you don’t wanna try.
>>62167440
Less than a human? You really think you use the gift of consciousness better, sitting at home, afraid to challenge yourself?
>>62160048
>humiliation ritual
And you think it’s not for everyone else? You really think everyone goes out and have crazy fun? Dude I seen guys who try and fail. Hell I try and fail every night, but that’s a thing about me. I am insane. Even when it fails, you try again. Until it works.
I think some people just deathly afraid of failing
Shit I WANTED to fail, cause failing would have been the proof that “I didn’t try, because it wouldn’t have work anyway, and being a neet was always better” but then it proved me wrong, that life can be fucking fun and easy at that, and I wasted YEARS, not having fun, not going out, not enjoying my life, listening and being tricked by social media to not even try.
I am almost 32, and my best years are gone being a loser neet who was afraid of trial and failure.

62168693
>>62158666
lol i got a great pc as a neet, you just didnt do it right

62168700
>>62168693
>>62163185
Dude, the amount of shit you can do on a super good pc is astronomical in comparison to a deck.
Ck3, and stellaris are cpu intensive specially in mid to late game cause of massive population boost all over the map, and I got myself a 5k computer to experiance all the glory of it, all my favorite mods available.
>>62159483
Yeah? Maybe. But just imagine this, the amount of motivation you will have, when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you, and then you realize oh no, I don’t have my own place, oh no, I got no money for a hotel, etc
You see what I am picturing here? I mean fuck, I wanna experience shit like that again and fully, and for that I need decent clothes and later a place of my own. a 8/10 moaning into your about ear how much she wants you, how much she loves and needs you, while you don’t have your place is the greatest motivator you can have in life, and if you want that motivation, you need to start waging a bit, so you can at least afford to go out and experience that massive boost of motivation.
Oh and guess how much porn I watched since it happened despite coming home blue balled and pissed? ZERO!
It’s a fucking testosterone shot straight into your brain that wakes you up to what a fucking lie you been living!
Social media lied and fucked me up, despite me not even having an Instagram, YouTube bullshit got me.
Don’t repeat my mistakes, and wake up wishing you didn’t do the shits I did (or didn’t)
I fucking WISH that world rejected me but instead it fucked me up by showing me how wrong I was.

62169232
>>62159483
better than she having you wait while fucking every other dude on a first date

62169261
>>62158666
Skill issue, Satan. There's much fun to be had for free.

62169348
>>62167534
>I only have one perspective so my perspective is right
Great now I know not to take your opinion seriously.

62169412
>>62158557
It's worse to be a wagie, obviously. Why would anyone ever think being NEET is worse? The whole point of working is to save up enough money to be NEET someday.

62169467
>>62169412
Yes and waging gets you more money and expedites that process so you can eventually neet. If you go neet mode with no money you're just suffering and can't truly enjoy life, and the "enjoyment" you have is just consuming media which makes you as much of a goy as a wagie.

62169540
>>62159267
Kierkegaard was based Dane, like Schacht.

62170345
>>62158557
depends on your situation. neet is better when you can actually afford it. if you need money then having a job is better no matter how soul crushing it is most of the time.

62170481
>>62159382
At least you know what checked actually means unlike that other dude.
But honestly man, why would my view be goyish? I am just saying biology will motivate you in life aka a hot woman
>>62169232
Fuck yeah dude. A hot woman keep saying I love you while pulling your hair, moaning and can’t stop herself from kissing you? Yeah I don’t care what she did with who before at that moment
>>62169261
Bro I had a one full terabyte of Skyrim and it’s mod enable on my shit laptop and was playing it without issue, so I have no trouble going around my laptop limitation. I could entertain myself with two absolutly simple games like xcom piretez or dominion 6 (both that I loved) then when I got bored I would used chatgpt to make assets and modded the game to my taste myself and started over, so no, I know how to not get bored either.
Problem is that a shit laptop is just not able to handle all the calculation of ck3 or stellaris (thanks to paradox shit programming) and total war had to be played on low settings.
I don’t like that shit. I don’t wanna be limited like this. Why would I limit myself to some fake and not my favorite, while I can go work, make some money, and get a pc that can handle ALL MY GAMES?
>>62169467
Yep. A smart wagie is a free man.
my problem with being a neet was always lack of safety net, but a wagie has that and he can get out of rat race faster.
>>62169412
Sure, we all love to be neet. But being a retired YOUNG neet, with money and your own car and place, is hard fucking work. (Or luck)
You can either sit on your ass and wish to be like that, have a good luck in lotto or stocks or crypto or work your ass and wage. In the end, the wagie gonna win, because he got more money to dump into stocks and crypto while a neet doesnt.
And god, I fucking WISHED I had my own place right now dude.

62170488
>>62170481
It’s still me, I don’t know why my id keep changing, probably cause I am a phonefag posting at work

62170497
Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.

Neeting and waging are two sides of the same coin. Balance in all things and you will find peace.

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

62175198
>>62158601
Skill issue. I'm working on become turboneet through three sources and will clear 93-95k when they are approved.

62175347
>>62170481
>>62170345
Almost everyone that owns a house in a top tier city came from well off families. I don’t think the majority truly realize how important family help is and how big the wealth gap is.
Good houses in good areas are truly unaffordable for normal or people in the bottom 95%.

62175361
>>62170497
> Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.
There is nothing productive about waking up at 6am everyday. Neet is a choice but waging isn’t. I think this is what no one wants to say. No one working would choose to work if they didn’t have to work.

62175389
>>62158557
Diogenes, Buddha and Jesus was Neets
nobody remembers the trillions of wagies
being a wagie is worser than being a neet

62175537
>>62167410
the real best of both worlds is WFH wagie
>forced into a regular wake up schedule that isn’t obscenely early or late
>no commute
>less oversight allows you to better enjoy the downtime inherent to any job, without giving you so much free time as to burn out media quickly
>access to your own kitchen during breaks and all the wagie bucks to buy good ingredients
>once again no commute, allowing you to instantly switch to leisure the moment the workday is done

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 116 replies — 26.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 116 • Updated: 2026-04-30 19:11 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62164460
>NEETs when you ask them to show you some of the art and projects they "have time to create since they're not a slave like you"

62164470
>>62164460
i've beaten my favorite game nearly 5 times in the past month and wrote some genderbent DEI thot getting raped and mindbroken
how 'bout u?

62164922
>>62156751
simple i wasn't born a slave with a pink id

62165197
>>62164460
Is it so difficult to grasp why somebody who isn't compelled to conform to working their whole life is also not compelled to try and impress somebody who is?

62165794
>>62156775
yeah i never had a job because i keep sperging out in the few interviews i get

62165803
>>62164460
I just feel bad for their Mom's more than anything.

62165810
>>62157256
AI is based and does the stupid shit I don't want to do
sucks for the accountants that get left out, great for the ones that survive. Bookkeepers / entry level on suicide watch.

62166342
>>62156871
hobbies cost money

62166357
>>62164460
Why would I need to prove you how productive I am. I could rest an entire life and it wouldnt change much about the superiority of the NEET lifestyle.

62166361
>>62156751
Back when I was a neet many years ago I felt like such a god damn loser during the week when all the wagies were off waging. It was pretty bad for my psyche. Looking back those were some of the best days of my life. Especially when I had some good weed. Getting high, smoking cigs, and playing black ops. Fuck those were the glory days

62166616
>>62165197
>>62166357

62166678
>>62156751
>I'm bored with my infinite free time with infinite access to infinite materials online
Unironically kill yourself you worthless braindead carbon emitter
You were born to be a spineless barely sentient farm hand who does nothing but work and eat and die alone for someone else but you were born too late even for that

62166894
>>62158971

62166973
>>62166678
So I actually use the internet to achive productive things. Did research on drones and electric bikes. None of this matters if you have no money to follow through.

62167037
>>62163096
>cured me but dick no longer works
This is me with tramadol.

62167148
>>62164118
>electrical engineering student
unless you are working on boner inducing projects or at an ivy league, i suggest changing majors. these jeets are taking all the jobs

t. EE

62168741
>>62166894
>Got paid $12k to speak at a university
Boomers really did have it easy
Insane how many more opportunities old people have compared to the current generation

62168749
>>62156751
>how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5
You're a failed normie and you're not mentally wired for long term NEET life. Not really saying this to attack you, but it's true. Long term NEETs need some schizoid adjacent type condition, not just any anon can do this, despite a lot having been meme'd into it.

Go back to normie life. It's psychologically necessary for you, it's not a retreat or act of cucking.

62168769
>>62156751
Are you financially set? Can you live off your investments? Big difference between a broke and a rich neet, even between a modest and a poor one. I'm a poor semi-neet (part-time shitty job) and sometimes I genuinely want to kill myself, but mostly because I'm broke.

62171342
>>62156751
>Oy vey, NEETing is bad, understand!!?? Waging is good.

62171475
>>62156751
I would love to join the NEET game, get a hobby, join a club. Make your home cooler. Develop a skill for fun, even if it's just a particular video game.

You sound like the faggots who want wfh to end just because you're bored/boring or hate your home life.
Don't be that kind of faggot.

62172015
I got the job and am still a sexless anti social.
What now?

62172051
Basketball American NEETS have vibrant social lives. You are just a boring loser with or without a job.

62172174
>>62156871
this
>>62159344
so just be bored for a few hours you overstimulated faggot

62172195
>>62156751
Honestly OP, if you don't invest your time in passive income from social media you're retarded.
Generating content for stupid children or boomers is easier than ever, and with no apparent hobbies why not develop passive income streams

62172363
>>62171342
The amount of retards like this that unironically think that not NEETing aka being in work, education, or training is somehow a jewish scheme is proof that we need to cull the weak and comfortable.
100 years ago there was no disability from the government. Hell, even 60 years ago.
Your ancestors worked much more for much less. They absolutely did complain, you will never hear that but no one in history is content. Only NEETS are content. Being content means giving up on living.
Hardly any true NEETs exist, and hardly any would need to be killed/exercised. But those who do are far gone and deserve death, for they are not living.

62173517
>>62172363
False
There have always been beggars who chill all day.

62174847
teat

62174907
>>62165197
>>62166357
Lol

62174925
>>62166361
This was me too. I was supposed to feel bad I didn’t have a job in my 20s and was living at home.
Now I retired at 28 and realized why it id called the rat races. It is for rodents.

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-30 22:38 UTC

OP

MSTR?

Early replies (first 3)

62175491
>>62175475

62175593
interesting

62175662
zoom out bucko

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62175693
>>62175475
it's different this time

62175747
Just bought more

62175812
>>62175475

item.title: I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS???? — 44 replies — 6.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-04-30 16:26 UTC

OP

I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Early replies (first 3)

62165377
>>62165360
Become an overnight security guard with a site in a rich area that’s internal (you’re inside a building).

The golden goose is MAG7 tech companies. I’ve literally and unironically done security for google. Max comfy

62165379
>>62165360
I do. I work like ~5 hours a day and play on my phone while eating a ton of corporate junk food and hitting on the co-workers for the rest. Must be a skill issue.

62165445
>>62165360
E Z ly
U just week

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165811
>>62165360
I got rich on my own and then went to a government job for fun, prestige. Agreed.

Especially if you're not making bookoobucks it'd be soul crushingly hellish to earn baby money in some bleh position, a really significant amount that goes to paying for transportation, food and clothes specific to the office.

It's especially wild for women to do this shit in Jewish daycare when they could just stay home and between the not-commuting, the better home make meals

62165817
>>62165360
WFH at least hybrid solutions or fully remote, 40hr contracts MAX and 35hr ideal, im using 20hr+ a week to put into my own businesses and side hustles to supplement my income and eventually if fortunate enough replace my job.

62165830
>>62165377
What is the pay and bennies like? Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?

62165918
>>62165811
Women enjoy keeping society running.

62166277
>>62165811
Women on average are a bit less smart than men, but this means there is a giant glut of midwit women more than midwit men, and the midwits especially fall for Jewish and feminist talking points.

62166475
>>62165379
We have a room at work with big comfy chairs where we all sleep and watch movies, we work 13hrs but at the most actually go and do 3 hours of work.

62166487
>>62165830
>Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?
they're fucking retarded, anon

62166489
Wagies are spiritually unwell to do what they do. I pray for them nightly.

62166493
Their soul slowly erodes and they become hollow shells of who they used to be.

62166854
>>62165811
Being a SAHM is actually harder than doing nothing in the office all day.

>But what about the mind numbing boringness!

Remember women are great at socialization and finding things to talk about. Unlike a man who will become le office space women just find ways to get through the boredom. I'm not justifying their behavior, I just know that the average western woman isn't as tough as her ancestors 100+ years ago.

62166949
>>62165360
Idk. My job is really good and I’ve been doing it 15 years, the only job I’ve ever been able to do this long, and it’s still hell.

62166970
>>62166949
Same, my job is good for what it is. I've only been in the workforce for 5 years and I think I'm going to kill myself.

62167031
>>62165377
You’re essentially lower class.
>>62165806
When you realize 99% of people are born to work.

62168374
>>62166493
I fear that is already happening to me :(

62168766
>>62166949
>>62166970
Sounds like no matter what you did, you’d still bitch about everything.

62168822
my job is ok, but it's annoying to have to come in when I could do it all remotely, too bad I can't quit and neet but I like my lakehouse and boat too much to give them up.

62168835
Idk, I work 18 hours a week as a teacher for 2000€ and it's already too much work, how do you guys do 40 hours a week I will never understand

62171668
>>62165360
>HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????
1) they have low standards
2) they'r NPCs just following orders
3) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to end themselves
4) they hate every minute of it and use that hatred to keep going
5) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to take risks

62171714
>>62165830
And how will these cameras and locks stop criminals?
Human presence alone deters 90% of potential theft.
>t. zoom zooms and niggers see me and v line the other way

62172531
>>62165360
The trick is you don't live long enough to ever really finish. it's a shell game where you believe that at the end there is something better waiting for you when really if you didn't have it to begin with you were never going to have it.

62172580
>>62165377
>I’ve literally and unironically done security for google.

How would you do it figuratively and ironically?

62172962
if you hate your shit do something else. people do it 30 years cause they dont hate it enough to stop

62173033
>>62165360
Find a good job.
I am slaving for shareholders but we have fun and the pay is not bad.

62173103
>>62165360
seriously, become black, get money from gob, steal and rape white goys and be recognized as an eternal victim that deserves everyone's favors and sympathy

62173916
>>62165647
I would rope if I have to work in an open plan office like that again.
For me, it's full WFH now or nothing.

62173930
>>62168835
this also jelly about the 18h. currently at 32 and that shit is borderline doable. dont know how I was able to do 40 the first few years. retards are basically throwing their life away for 15-20$ an hour. you cant make this shit up and at the end of the month their bank account still ends up being at 0 lol

62174044
>>62168835
I am a farmer and I choose how much I work most of the year. I have also worked in factories so I know what a 40 hour week is like. After I work 6 hours in a day I really want to be done and think about offing myself. If I do no work at all in a day I feel useless and think about offing myself. I think 3-4 hours of work per day is the sweet spot. It is just enough to feel like I accomplished something but not too much that I hate my life.

62174065
>>62165360
It could be worse. You could be a professional.

I'm in litigation hell.

62174236
>>62165360
I'm in the process of becoming Uberneet
>100% VA rated
>Medical retirement from fed job
Can't stand it anymore. Fuck them all

62174313
it's not sustainable, you gain weight, sleep deprivation in the norm etc.

even if you make it retirement age of 68yo, you gonna have a heart attack year after retiring because that 35 years of waging taking toll on body

you need to have a remote job at minimum. but preferable something like trading or playing poker in Pattaya isntead of waging ofcourse is the optimal. me have never had a proper job after some summer jobs, it was horrendous counting the minutes and watching clock to hit 4pm to get home

item.title: Who /mid/ here? — 15 replies — 4.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who /mid/ here?

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-30 20:08 UTC

OP

By this I mean not even close to being truly successful but also miles past the average normalfag.

I'm mid twenties $1.3 mil liquid (in UK where this is far harder/rarer) and a doctor after growing up with abusive single mum on welfare/benefits. I know it sounds arrogant but I honestly don't think I have ever met anyone irl the same age who is more impressive than me but at the same time MrBeast is a similar age and literally has like 2,000x my net worth. I can't afford private jet chartering, mansions, Ferraris etc and doubt I'll be able to until age 35 and even then I can't go all out, and while mid twenties isn't old it's not young and unc status is very rapidly approaching.

I guess I'm grateful for how things have turned out but at the same time I'm aware I've got such a long way to go and aren't really doing well vs really successful people, just doing well compared to the average person. Like I almost wish I could rewind the clock and have another go even though I probably wouldn't even get this far.

Anyone else know this feel?

Early replies (first 3)

62174833
>waaah waaaah I'm only a minor duke among the peasents in England waaah
Kys

62174843
So what's the point of this thread? If you're smart you protect this baby fortune from your government who is about to start seizing things to finance their debt spiral

62174872
>>62174827
Dude I say it the nicest way I can, but I read like few sentences until I got to Mr beast, and I think you are just mentally ill. Go to a psychiatrist and get on meds.
If you are a fucking doctor at mid 20s and with so much money and you still think you are mid and comparing yourself to a YouTuber? You will never be happy
I didn’t even need to read the rest to knkw how messed up you might be
>unc status approaching
Nvm I read more and honestly, dude. Just fucking get off social media. Who THE FUCK cares.
Actually, you know what? Nvm
Be sad, never go out, never approach woman, because you will never be enough
My one solace in life is that they are people like you mikes ahead of me, and still fuck their life up at the end

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174875
>>62174827
are u retarded? the average wage in UK for professionals is like 20k a year

you are crying about having 1.3MM lmao

62174882
for a smart person, you are very retarded

62174906
>>62174872
I'm not genuinely crying over this like the wojak but I won't lie it bothers me. I do go out, have sex, have a social life etc already but that doesn't change any of this.

62174937
>>62174906
If you go out and have sex and have a social life, then wtf is with crying over “hurr durr unc status approaching” nigga?
Just close the social media and count your blessings

62174943
>>62174827
Low 7 figure purgatory

62174969
>>62174906
If you were like a CEO or something I would get it, but your a doctor bro best you can hope for is owning your own practice and high 7 figures by the time you die, maybe a nice coin collection or something you leave to your progeny. You didn't choose the fast money high risk lifestyle so why bitch that you're not making fast money

62174994
>>62174906
you might need therapy, why do you want all that? why do you want to fill the void with money?

62175003
>>62174827
yea you suck ass to be hoenst, im 18 and a freshly printed millionaire. and i have a pringles can for a penis. shits so cash

62175007
>>62174969
Lol I think you are describing medicine in USA. In the UK I doubt there is a single doc on high 7 figs who got there through medicine. Even £1 mil a year would be extremely extremely rare. It's also an issue with all jobs, IB, law etc are all shit here too.

I'm making good money from trading which is my fast money, but even with this there is a limit since I can't make risky bets anymore and if I was to try hadn't at business I'm not hitting 8 figs NW by 35 at minimum.

>>62174994
I want to be rich cause it's fun. Even being semi well off is clearly allows me to live much better than my classmates from med school

62175037
>>62175007
I am talking in the US yeah, talking high 7 figs networth though not per year income, I've met probably 5-6 doctors of various types who own their own practice and all make good money and have 5m-30m networth about.

If you're dedicated to the fast money trying to trade your way into riches than yes can understand why you would be distraught hitting a point where it seems you can't take on more risk without risking it all. Without having faced this scenario myself it's my understanding that's pretty much the barrier for us lower class peons yes, you don't get to 8-9 figures without massive risk

62175050
>>62175037
Even for net worth in the UK it's really rare, my uni tutor who was a money focussed anaesthetist Oxford grad and about 50 still wasn't a millionaire and this is just normal here.

Yeah it sucks. It is just so hard to keep going because less risky stuff takes forever and I can't risk moonshots because if I pick the wrong one I am beyond fucked and it will take forever to recover.

62175212
>>62174827
demoralisation thread

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 36 replies — 3.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-04-30 14:22 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62161134
>walking across
More like driving across and foling yourself hiking for a few minutes

62161135
>>62161076
Oh yeah? So why he didn't get millions of views? Yeah I guess the classic goycattle quote "he didn't work hard enough" right?https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62161142
>>62161135
What part of 'professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached' did you miss?

62161154
>>62161142
>noooooo you must take a photo from your footage that is already in the video as thumbnail put some goycattle shit in it so goycattle watch it
God I fucking hate ecelebs and their "fans". First people to get the bullet before anyone else should be you and them

62161156
>>62161076
There's whores and then there is Mr Beast...

62161182
>professional editing
So you have to pay someone

62161185
>>62161084
same can be said for actors

62161541
>>62161135
It's not the editing though it wouldn't have hurt >>62161142 >>62161154
It's because they didn't talk to other people. Who wants to watch 2000 hours of two fags walking?
They were supposed to do interviews with cleetus and lashonda and other multiculti adventures

62162173
psychopaths should be culled at school age to prevent this kind of thing. Does he not understand you'd need to have money to do this in the first place and wouldn't be able to work for the half a year it took you to do this, along with it being physically grueling

62162184
>>62161076
im tired of seeing mr beast-esque channels all over youtube, what are some actual good channels?

62162212
>>62161154
you not liking something doesn't mean it's not effective, whiny little turd

62162225
>>62162184
>channels
is what ruined it, just look up what you want to see and click the most homely video

62162234
>>62161086
>resume gap = you'll never enter the workforce again
sounds like the economy's problem, call me when applying for jobs is based on competence instead of meaningless retard criteria

62162262
>>62161076
He is somewhat correct, but you have to do it right requires very expensive production team

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

62163322
>>62162173
I think he's more getting at an idea more than specifically advocating people walk across the US. Remember he got famous for saying "Logan Paul" 500,000 times or something i forget the amount, he did a lot of endurance challenges like that which got him famous. I think he's more saying people do something ridiculous and hard and memeable and film it but it cant be easy because then there's no skin in the game its gotta actually be hard.

62164259
>>62162212
Is this Mrbeast? Who the fuck like genuinely what fucking retarded goycattle will watch a video just because he has thumbnail like Mrbeast? Like seriously? They are a fucking meme and odd. Everyone makes fun of them not praise them like it's some sort of magic that will help your videos. Mrbeast is a clown and his goycattle fans are sub 60 IQ

62164413
this jewish white nigger slave is an industry plant, i'm not trusting a single word coming out of its mouth

62164430
>>62161076
>MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US
Fuck it, call me Sam Porter.

62168164
>>62161076
>can get a million subs
This translates to how much in real currency?

62170693
>>62161084
you can say this about anything

62170796
>>62161122
This, so much this...

62171081
>>62168164
$60k to $1M a year depending on your output.

62171130
>>62161076
some buddhist monks did that and got ran over almost immediately

62171132
>>62162786
He's a 27yo YouTuber worth billions who clawed his way out of poverty just by grinding YouTube for five years, from 2012 to 2017. He leveraged his fame to build a burger company and a hugely successful candy company, and he plans to expand to video games and other industries.

62173729
>>62171132
He actually has more debt than money he claims

62173789
I just saw a black dude getting run over doing this lol. The car hit the breaks but was rear ended and that pushed him into the black guy. Am unsure if he died.
